raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Book banning in schools represents an alarming trend against academic freedom.",
    "The decision by the Temecula Valley Unified School District to block a state-approved textbook perpetuates the exclusion of diverse perspectives.",
    "School boards in California have been influenced by a small group seeking to erase historical narratives of people of color and non-conforming communities.",
    "Assembly Bill 1078 requires a super majority on the school board to vote in favor of banning a book.",
    "AB 1078 guarantees parents the right to appeal book banning decisions to the County Board of Education.",
    "AB 1078 aims to empower parents and promote active participation in their children's education.",
    "Dr. Corey Jackson claims that the rise of white Christian nationalist extremism seeks to erase valuable contributions from marginalized communities.",
    "Dr. Jackson emphasizes that education should foster knowledge, empathy, and understanding.",
    "AB 1078 is presented as a necessary response to protect access to diverse educational perspectives."
  ]
}
```
